Off Calendar Aug-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Emily Collins, Esq. 408-360-8485 of Hunt & Henriques for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Counsel submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

The Motion is granted. The Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Are Deemed Admitted.

The prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order directly to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
